## Licensing and provenance

- [ ] I have the right to contribute this change under the repository's MIT License.
- [ ] I identified the source and license of all third-party code, data, models, images, fonts, and fixtures added by this change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and documented in English.
- [ ] Tests cover the behavior or the absence of tests is explained.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog entries are updated when users or integrators need them.
- [ ] Security-sensitive input and failure paths were considered.
